description: Plugin-distributed hooks for retail-store-operations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags retail store operations anti-patterns (schedule with no traffic basis, markdown with no sell-through rationale, hard-coded sales/shrink figure with no date, safety stock/replenishment with no service-level note). Set RETAIL_STORE_OPS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
